text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

147 
NCH_CLM_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
NCH Claim Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code used to identify the type of claim record being processed in NCH. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_TYPE 
LONG NAME: NCH_CLM_TYPE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
20 = Medicare Non-Swing Bed Skilled Nursing Facility (SNF) Claim 
30 = Medicare Swing Bed SNF Claim 
60 = Medicare Inpatient Claim 
61 = Medicare Inpatient Full
